_README: Approval/values for ENUM CANDIDATES (signal = ENUM suffix | mysql enum | tinyint). Candidates need review + values during S0-S7 (see enum-candidates.json). Keyed by "Table.Column" (preferred) or bare "Column". Per entry: { "disable": true } rejects a false positive (e.g. a tinyint flag); { "source": "H_ENUM_X" } pulls values live from that table; { "values": [{"key","value"}] } sets them inline (fills the H_ENUM_ coverage gap). mysql-enum values come from the column def and H_ENUM_ suffix matches resolve live with no entry needed; tinyint and uncovered suffixes stay PENDING (raw) until approved here.
